text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — check out the mod handbook and feel free to reach out if you have any questions. Looking forward to working with you!

Welcome aboard, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you helping shape our community events — keep an eye on the events channel for upcoming opportunities. Great to have you here!

Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. We're so glad to have someone with your experience guiding newer members — please introduce yourself in the mentors channel when you get a chance. Excited to have you!
